commits.subject: feat: Add /staff user_migrate and /staff user_purge to move a member’s Arbiter history to a replacement Discord account, copy their roles, merge overlapping records safely, resync the new nickname, and delete the old account record once all references have been cleared
commits.description: Add /staff user_migrate and /staff user_purge to move a member’s Arbiter history to a replacement Discord account, copy their roles, merge overlapping records safely, resync the new nickname, and delete the old account record once all references have been cleared
